caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is seated at a dark wooden table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black equipment case. In the background, white banners display a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE," while a blue wall banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man holds a small electronic device in his right hand and a printed document in his left. As the sequence progresses, he speaks while glancing between the device and the document, shifting his facial expression and slight head position. A red and white circular logo featuring "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom corners of the scene, and a smaller branded cup sits on the table.
